title: eriogonum corymbosum var. nilesii
intro: Eriogonum corymbosum var. nilesii, also known as Niles' buckwheat, is a rare, perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eriogonum corymbosum var. nilesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
